Table II: Measured cross section per nucleon, in units 10$^{-39}$ cm$^2$ / GeV$^2$ / nucleon. 
Format: Idx, Eavail (low-edge of bin -- up-edge of bin), q3 (low-edge of bin -- up-edge of bin), cross section
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
